title: Engineering & Quoting Manager #82137
description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: Manufacturing
  • Position Title: Engineering & Quoting Manager
  • Working Location: Tai Seng
  • Working Hours: 5 days (Mon – Fri, 8.00am – 5.45pm)
  • Salary Package: Basic salary + AWS + Performance Bonus
  • Duration: Permanent Role

Key Responsibilities

  • Coordinate with the Senior Management team
  • Create, track, and manage department KPIs, trends, goals, and objectives
  • Train, develop, and support supervisors, leads, and technicians
  • Take responsibility for creating and maintaining technical documentation (e.g. drawings, models, NPI, SOP, OMS)
  • Maintain and continuously improve processes using ISO-documented procedures
  • Ensure strong understanding and proper use of ERP/MRP systems and data accuracy
  • Lead root cause analysis and resolution through CAR and OFI processes
  • Maintain and track ECOs and EOL items
  • Communicate regularly with related departments and customers on the status of engineering projects and RFQs
  • Use checklists to ensure teams properly review standards and requirements, including equipment, packaging, and tooling, before order processing
  • Set standards for cost, labour, pricing, and lead times to ensure timely and consistent quotations
  • Negotiate and improve supplier pricing, focusing on value, cost efficiency, and competitiveness
  • Deliver accurate and timely cost estimates to support profitability and market competitiveness
  • Perform other duties as assigned by the Business Unit Director
  • Conduct personnel performance reviews and assessments

APPLY NOW!!!

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business Management, Engineering, or equivalent practical experience
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office, with hands-on experience in data handling and Excel reporting
  • Prior experience using ERP/MRP systems
  • Able to interpret customer-provided technical drawings, BOMs, and procedures

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #82137 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.
